items.current_problem: target is denser than benchmark references
items.proposed_change: increase vertical spacing, break stacked content into distinct bands, and reduce simultaneous visual load per viewport
items.evidence: Live benchmark references favor clear top-level hierarchy, compact status groups, and stronger scan rhythm. The dashboard patch adds a first-viewport evidence strip for source route, model evidence, REC mode, and report-only execution before detailed score panels.
